warehouse_sizing_guidelines.S: Light BI (<20 users), simple transforms, <1TB daily

multi_cluster_triggers: Power BI DirectQuery with >15 concurrent users
Any BI tool with >30 concurrent users
SLA requires <30 second response times under load

openflow_oracle.description: Table 7 - Openflow Connector for Oracle. Per licensed core per month.

organization_usage.description: Table 8 - Organization Usage tiered credit pricing based on Records Powering Views per month

ramp_curves.description: Birdbox-style power-curve ramp model. factor(month) = clamp(((month - dev_start + 1) / (go_live - dev_start + 1)) ^ exponent, 0, 1). After go_live month, factor stays at 1.0; pre-dev_start it is 0. 'manual' uses exponent 0 to force factor=0 (caller overrides per-month values).
ramp_curves.formula: factor(m) = ((m - dev_start + 1) / (go_live - dev_start + 1)) ^ exponent, clamped to [0, 1]

curve_descriptions.slowest: Slowest Ramp - slow initial consumption, gradually increasing growth rate until go-live
curve_descriptions.slow: Slow Ramp - happy medium between Slowest and Linear
curve_descriptions.linear: Linear Ramp - linear growth from dev start through go-live
curve_descriptions.fast: Fast Ramp - happy medium between Fastest and Linear
curve_descriptions.fastest: Fastest Ramp - quicker initial consumption, gradually decreasing growth rate until go-live
curve_descriptions.manual: Manual - sets all months to 0; caller overrides per-month values

replication.description: Replication cost model from the Apr 2026 Replication Cost Calculator. Used for BCDR, DR, data sharing, and migration sizings.

compute_credits_per_TB.note: Empirically observed range across all customers is 3-5. Compute credits/TB are higher for small payloads with a large object count due to metadata scan dominating.

formulas.year_over_year_growth: year_n_change_TB = year_(n-1)_change_TB * (1 + yoy_pct); year_n_storage_TB = year_(n-1)_total + year_(n-1)_growth_TB

eco_cache.description: Egress Cost Optimizer (ECO) Cache - special target deployment with update-frequency-based credit consumption.
eco_cache.note: ECO Cache is a target-only option. Egress to ECO Cache is rated per the egress_matrix; compute is rated per update_frequency_factors.
